description: Operational insights into Vector pipelines: throughput, delivery drift, errors, drops/discards, and buffer saturation.

panels.description: Current drift (received − sent) at buffer layer.
panels.title: Current Drift (events/s)

panels.description: Current loss rate overall (discarded + dropped) events/s. Excludes filter drops.
panels.title: Current Loss (events/s)

panels.description: Total events received by all components (sources/transforms/sinks) per second.
panels.title: Component Throughput (received events/s)

panels.description: Received − sent at the buffer layer. Healthy is ~0. Positive means backlog building; negative means draining.
panels.title: Delivery Drift (buffer received − buffer sent)

panels.description: Sent/Received ratio at the buffer layer. 1.0 is perfect; <1 falling behind; >1 draining buffers.
panels.title: Delivery Ratio (buffer sent ÷ buffer received)

panels.description: Error rate per component type (source/transform/sink). Use this to spot failing sinks or misbehaving transforms.
panels.title: Component Errors (rate) by component_type

panels.description: Errors divided by received events per component_type. A practical error-rate percentage-like view.
panels.title: Error Rate (errors ÷ received) by component_type

panels.description: Discarded events (component-level) and dropped events (pipeline-level) per second. We exclude filter events as these are usually intentional drops
panels.title: Events Discarded / Dropped (excluding filter events)

panels.description: Filtered Events. These are events dropped / discarded by a filter. These are typically intentional and used to filter out noisy events from logs
panels.title: Filtered Events

panels.description: Discarded events (component-level) and dropped events (pipeline-level) per second.
panels.title: Events Discarded / Dropped (Per Component)

panels.description: Dropped events as a fraction of received traffic. This should be near zero; spikes indicate unexpected loss (backpressure, overflow, or sink failures). Includes filtered events
panels.title: Dropped Fraction (dropped ÷ received)

panels.description: Current number of events sitting in buffers. Track saturation/accumulation.
panels.title: Buffer Utilization

panels.description: Received events by source (if source label exists). If your source label differs, adjust group-by accordingly.
panels.title: Source Throughput by source

panels.description: CPU usage per pod (cores). Uses cAdvisor container_cpu_usage_seconds_total summed per pod. Adjust label filters if your container metrics use different labels.
panels.title: Pod CPU Usage (cores) — pods matching $job

panels.description: Memory working set per pod (bytes). Uses cAdvisor container_memory_working_set_bytes summed per pod.
panels.title: Pod Memory Working Set (bytes) — pods matching $job

list.description: Vector job label from vector_build_info filtered by cluster
list.label: Job
list.name: job

title: Vector / Operational Insights
